release.name: beta
release.body:
## [2.14.2](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/compare/n8n@2.14.1...n8n@2.14.2) (2026-03-26)


### Bug Fixes

* **editor:** Clean up quick connect feature flag and fix first load ([#27550](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/27550)) ([af3a23a](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/af3a23a2ec99601428487cefc22f20f7de63150e))
* **editor:** Populate workflowDocumentStore in execution preview iframe ([#27546](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/27546)) ([1c31a77](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/1c31a777c687c48669f3e68163f1b1f054bce0be))
* **editor:** Use direct store reference for connections in initializeWorkspace ([#27559](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/27559)) ([07dc87d](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/07dc87d3f77895d246624bfe0174594792bb894a))

items.rawText: **editor:** Clean up quick connect feature flag and fix first load ([#27550](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/27550)) ([af3a23a](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/af3a23a2ec99601428487cefc22f20f7de63150e))

**editor:** Populate workflowDocumentStore in execution preview iframe ([#27546](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/27546)) ([1c31a77](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/1c31a777c687c48669f3e68163f1b1f054bce0be))

**editor:** Use direct store reference for connections in initializeWorkspace ([#27559](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/27559)) ([07dc87d](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/07dc87d3f77895d246624bfe0174594792bb894a))
